patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/470

Shorthand date filters for agent loops: `pm list --today` (updated today) and `pm list --recent` (updated in the last 7 days) as sugar over --updated-after, avoiding ISO-timestamp construction. Wire per the new-flag checklist (contracts, completions, docs, MCP param parity).
GH-470: pm list --today and --recent shorthand filters for recently active items

Dogfood GH-470: agents wanting recently active items must hand-build --updated-after ISO timestamps; --today / --recent (last 7 days) shorthands cut tokens. Duplicate check: searched list today recent shorthand — no existing item.
pm list --today filters to items updated today and --recent to the last 7 days; both compose with existing filters, appear in help/contracts/completions, and are covered by specs
